objective: Separate content-ko and content-pipeline responsibilities. Language-specific engines stay in content repos; pipeline holds language-agnostic framework only.

parallel_groups.note: Pipeline framework and content-ko interface can be built in parallel
E2E verification requires both sides ready

prerequisites.hard_blocker: KO-RES-07 (100% token resolution) must be COMPLETED before starting SEP-01

tasks.title: 歸檔一次性腳本 / Archive one-off scripts
tasks.impact: Reduces scripts/ clutter from 30 files to ~12 active files
tasks.priority: 🟢 可以現在做 / Can do now
tasks.goal: Move completed migration/patching scripts to scripts/archive/ so only active tools remain in scripts/.
actions: Create directory: content-ko/scripts/archive/

Move the following files to scripts/archive/: add_final_entries.py, add_remaining_entries.py, migrate_legacy_atoms.py, restore_canonical_ids.py, compare_vs_legacy.py, merge_atoms.py, merge_mapping_patch.py, split_mapping.py, unify_dictionary.py, import_lllo_ko.py (replaced by import_lllo_raw.py)
Verify no active script imports from any archived file: grep -r 'from.*add_final_entries\|from.*migrate_legacy' scripts/
Verify pipeline still runs: python scripts/run_mapping_pipeline.py
acceptance: scripts/ directory contains only active tools (≤15 files).
scripts/archive/ contains all one-off scripts.
python scripts/run_mapping_pipeline.py still passes.
python tests/run_rule_tests.py still passes.

tasks.title: 重整 content-ko 引擎目錄 / Restructure content-ko engine directory
tasks.impact: Establishes clean engine/ directory as the language-specific engine home
tasks.priority: 🟡 等韓語穩定後 / After KO stabilizes
tasks.goal: Rename scripts/core/ to engine/ and update all import paths. This makes it clear that the engine is a first-class component, not a utility script.
actions: Step 1: Create content-ko/engine/ directory

Step 2: Copy (do NOT delete yet) the following files from scripts/core/ to engine/: rules_engine.py, lemmatizer.py, tokenizer.py. Do NOT copy qa_gates.py and cache_manager.py (those go to pipeline later).
Step 3: Copy scripts/core/rules/ directory to engine/rules/
Step 4: Create engine/__init__.py with: from .rules_engine import RulesEngine; from .lemmatizer import KoreanLemmatizer; from .tokenizer import KoreanTokenizer

Step 5: Update import paths in ALL files that reference scripts.core or scripts/core: run_mapping_pipeline.py, import_lllo_raw.py, audit_content_tokens.py, audit_tokens.py, benchmark_p1.py, validate_p1.py, analyze_unresolved.py, debug_lookup.py. Change 'from scripts.core.X import Y' to 'from engine.X import Y' or adjust sys.path accordingly.
Step 6: Run full test suite to verify nothing broke.
Step 7: Only after all tests pass, delete the old scripts/core/ directory (except qa_gates.py and cache_manager.py which stay temporarily).
acceptance: engine/ directory exists with rules_engine.py, lemmatizer.py, tokenizer.py, rules/.
scripts/core/ is deleted (except qa_gates.py, cache_manager.py if still needed).
All import paths updated — no reference to 'scripts.core' or 'scripts/core' remains.
python tests/run_rule_tests.py passes.
python scripts/run_mapping_pipeline.py passes with 0% unresolved.
tasks.verification: grep -r 'scripts.core' scripts/ && grep -r 'scripts/core' scripts/ (should return 0 results) && python tests/run_rule_tests.py && python scripts/run_mapping_pipeline.py
tasks.rollback: If tests fail, restore scripts/core/ from git: git checkout -- scripts/core/

tasks.title: 建立 Pipeline 通用框架 / Build pipeline framework
tasks.impact: Establishes the language-agnostic framework that all content repos will use
tasks.priority: 🟡 與 SEP-01 同時或之後 / With or after SEP-01
tasks.goal: Create the framework/ and contracts/ directories in content-pipeline with universal tools.
actions: Step 1: Create content-pipeline/contracts/engine_interface.py — Define BaseEngine abstract class with methods: tokenize(text) -> List[Dict], resolve_lemma(token) -> str, validate_reconstruction(tokens, original) -> bool
Step 2: Move content-ko/scripts/core/qa_gates.py to content-pipeline/framework/qa_gates.py. Remove language-specific regex (ko:* patterns) and make the gate interface generic.
Step 3: Move content-ko/scripts/core/cache_manager.py to content-pipeline/framework/cache_manager.py

Step 4: Create content-pipeline/framework/encoding.py — Extract NFC/NFD normalization utilities from rules_engine.py into a shared module. Do NOT move the Korean-specific Jamo logic, only the generic unicodedata.normalize wrappers.
Step 5: Create content-pipeline/framework/path_safety.py — Extract the ':' -> '__' path decoupling logic from content-ko/scripts/fix_windows_paths.py into a generic utility.
Step 6: Update content-pipeline/pipelines/build.py (new or updated) to accept --content-repo path and dynamically load the engine from that repo.
Step 7: Add content-pipeline/framework/__init__.py and content-pipeline/contracts/__init__.py
acceptance: BaseEngine interface is importable: python -c 'from contracts.engine_interface import BaseEngine'
qa_gates.py works standalone without Korean-specific imports.
encoding.py provides normalize_nfc() and normalize_nfd() wrappers.
path_safety.py provides canonical_to_fs() and fs_to_canonical() functions.
No Korean-specific logic exists in content-pipeline/ (grep for 가-힣 should return 0 results).
tasks.verification: cd content-pipeline && python -c 'from contracts.engine_interface import BaseEngine; print("OK")' && grep -r '[가-힣]' framework/ contracts/ (should be 0)

tasks.title: content-ko 實作 BaseEngine 介面 / content-ko implements BaseEngine
tasks.impact: Makes content-ko's engine callable by the pipeline framework
tasks.priority: 🟡 與 SEP-02 同時或之後 / With or after SEP-02
tasks.goal: Create a KoreanEngine class in content-ko/engine/ that implements the BaseEngine interface from content-pipeline.
actions: Step 1: In content-ko/engine/__init__.py, create KoreanEngine class that inherits from BaseEngine.
Step 2: Implement tokenize() — wraps KoreanTokenizer.tokenize_text(), converts output to List[Dict] per interface spec.
Step 3: Implement resolve_lemma() — wraps KoreanLemmatizer.resolve().
Step 4: Implement validate_reconstruction() — joins token surfaces and compares to original text.
Step 5: Add a register_engine() entry point so pipeline can discover this engine dynamically: e.g. engine_info = {'lang': 'ko', 'class': 'KoreanEngine', 'version': '1.0'}
Step 6: Verify: python -c 'from engine import KoreanEngine; e = KoreanEngine(); print(e.tokenize("안녕하세요"))'
acceptance: KoreanEngine inherits from BaseEngine.
All three interface methods (tokenize, resolve_lemma, validate_reconstruction) work correctly.
python -c 'from engine import KoreanEngine' succeeds.
Existing tests still pass.
tasks.verification: python -c 'from engine import KoreanEngine; e = KoreanEngine(); r = e.tokenize("저는 학생입니다"); print(r)' && python tests/run_rule_tests.py

tasks.title: 端到端驗證 / End-to-end verification
tasks.impact: Validates that the pipeline can build content-ko through the BaseEngine interface
tasks.goal: Run the full build pipeline from content-pipeline, using content-ko's KoreanEngine through the interface.
actions: Step 1: Run: cd content-pipeline && python pipelines/build.py --content-repo ../content-ko --lang ko --output ../release-aggregator/staging/
Step 2: Verify output assets match previous build output (diff check).
Step 3: Run QA gates from pipeline: python -m framework.qa_gates --report-dir ../content-ko/reports/
Step 4: If any discrepancy, fix and re-verify.
Step 5: Update release-aggregator/docs/guides/CONTENT_PIPELINE_SEPARATION.md — mark Phase 1+2 as COMPLETED.
acceptance: Pipeline build completes without error.
Output assets are identical to previous direct build.
QA gates pass from pipeline context.
No Korean-specific logic leaked into content-pipeline.
tasks.verification: cd content-pipeline && python pipelines/build.py --content-repo ../content-ko --lang ko --output /tmp/sep_test/ && diff -r /tmp/sep_test/ ../release-aggregator/staging/

tasks.title: 更新文件與路徑引用 / Update documentation and path references
tasks.impact: Ensures all docs reflect the new structure
tasks.goal: Update all documentation to reflect the new directory structure.
actions: Update content-ko/docs/handoffs/V5_AUTOMATION_ARCHITECTURE.md — change all scripts/core/ references to engine/.
Update content-ko/docs/handoffs/PIPELINE_COMPARISON.md — reflect new separation.
Update release-aggregator/docs/guides/V5_AUTOMATION_ARCHITECTURE.md — same path updates.
Update release-aggregator/docs/guides/REPO_RESPONSIBILITIES.md — update key directory listings.
Update release-aggregator/docs/guides/CONTENT_PIPELINE_SEPARATION.md — mark all phases COMPLETED.
Update release-aggregator/docs/workflow_map.md — add pipeline framework to flow.
Verify no broken file links: grep -r 'scripts/core' docs/
acceptance: No reference to 'scripts/core' remains in any doc file.
All file links in docs point to valid paths.
CONTENT_PIPELINE_SEPARATION.md shows all phases COMPLETED.

gemini_prompt_template: 請讀取 CONTENT_PIPELINE_SEPARATION_TASKS.json，執行任務 {TASK_ID}。設計文件在 release-aggregator/docs/guides/CONTENT_PIPELINE_SEPARATION.md。完成後請回報 changed_files、commands_run、test_results。
notes: SEP-00 can be done NOW, independently of Korean resolution status.
SEP-01 through SEP-04 should wait until KO-RES-07 is stable (0% unresolved).
Always use 'copy first, verify, then delete' strategy to avoid breaking anything.
The key rule: if it contains 가-힣 (Korean characters) in logic, it stays in content-ko. If it's pure framework, it goes to content-pipeline.
Each content-{lang} repo will follow content-ko's engine/ structure as a template.
